notes: v0.16.22 — BASTION's full module catalog goes live (39 modules across CORE / WEAPON / SHIELD / ENGINE / WINGS / FRAME tuned around its tank identity). Every tester's module inventory is WIPED so the new pool can be re-looted from scratch. Boss kills now drop modules every clear (not just first-clear) with rarity tied to difficulty:  EASY  40% common / 10% uncommon,  MEDIUM  40% uncommon / 10% rare,  HARD  40% rare / 10% epic,  BRUTAL  40% epic / 10% legendary. New MODULE DROPS info card on the boss screen shows the floor and ceiling rarity for the difficulty you've picked. Windows only.
